command: bash -c for u in "https://citeseerx.ist.psu.edu/viewdoc/download?doi=10.1.1.16.4658&rep=rep1&type=pdf" "https://web.archive.org/web/2021/https://www.neuron.yale.edu/neuron/static/papers/nc97.pdf" "https://www.neuron.yale.edu/neuron/static/papers/NeuralComputation-9-1179-1209.pdf"; do echo "=== $u ==="; curl -s -L --max-time 25 -I -w "HTTP:%{http_code} CT:%{content_type} SIZE:%{size_download}\n" "$u" 2>&1 | tail -3; done
